# UVLF data from Donnan et al. 2024 (arXiv:2403.03171v3), Table 2
# Columns: z , MUV , MUV bin width , Phi_UV [Mpc^-3 mag^-1] , sigma_Phi_UV_upper [Mpc^-3 mag^-1] , sigma_Phi_UV_lower [Mpc^-3 mag^-1]
# Fiducial cosmology (as assumed in the paper): H0 = 70 km s^-1 Mpc^-1, Omega_m = 0.3, Omega_Lambda = 0.7 (flat)
# z MUV MUV_bin_width Phi_UV [Mpc^-3 mag^-1] sigma_Phi_UV_upper [Mpc^-3 mag^-1] sigma_Phi_UV_lower [Mpc^-3 mag^-1]
